notes: On Fedora 38, it worked fine, but after upgrading to 39 a couple days ago, the game launched to the menu, and I adjusted some graphics settings to test performance. Upon attempting to launch the benchmark, my entire system locked up and required a hard reset. After that, the game wouldn't launch at all, failing to progress past the Rockstar logo screen. Just today I gave it another try, and while it did progress to the menu, it once again locked my system up completely, this time even killing my X-server instance. Game appears to be completely borked.
